summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PITCH'D major restructure (iteration 8). All core features working: Project Details section, Stage 1 (Lock Story Assets), Stage 2 (Production Details), Export via window.print(), and Post-Export Promo section.

ui_bugs.issue: collapsed prop only used for initial state - does not react to hasStartedTyping changes. Component uses useState(!collapsed) but doesn't update when collapsed prop changes.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix ProjectDetails collapse behavior - add useEffect to respond to collapsed prop changes
critical_code_review_comments: ProjectDetails.jsx line 47: useState(!collapsed) only sets initial state, should use useEffect to sync with prop changes
All other features implemented correctly per requirements
test_credentials: None required - no authentication in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified major restructure. Key features tested: Project Details (4 fields in 2x2 grid), Stage 1 (title/logline/tagline/synopsis selection with Lock Story Assets button), Stage 2 (Production Details with comparables, themes, format, budget, setting, period, target audience, attachments), Export One Sheet (window.print()), Post-Export Promo (dark section with PITCHD25 code, SLATR/SPOT'D cards). Backend returns new JSON fields: genre (array), comparableA, comparableB, themes, format, estimatedBudget, estimatedBudgetRange, targetAudience, period, setting.

project_details_section.collapse_on_typing: PARTIAL - initial state works but doesn't react to prop changes
